title: Send SMS Request
description: Request body for sending an SMS notification via the GOV.UK Notify API.

phone_number.description: UK mobile phone number of the recipient. E.164 format recommended.

template_id.description: UUID of the SMS template to use.

personalisation.description: Key-value pairs to fill placeholders in the template.

reference.description: Client-supplied unique reference string for this notification.

sms_sender_id.description: UUID of an SMS sender configured on the service. Overrides service default.
